home.subtitle: The new web platform is in the works. The app foundation is in place — catalog, tournaments and accounts are coming soon.

cart.summary: {count, plural, =0 {Your cart is empty} one {# item} other {# items}}

login.title: Log in
login.magicSent: We sent you a sign-in link. Check your email.

register.title: Sign up
register.success: Account created. Check your email to confirm your address.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.sent: If an account exists, we sent a password reset link.

reset.title: New password
reset.success: Your password was changed. You can now log in.

verify.success: Your email has been confirmed. Thank you!
verify.failed: The link is invalid or has expired.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.description: An extra layer of protection for your account using an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator).
twoFactor.scan: Scan the QR code in your authenticator app, then enter the code.
twoFactor.recoveryHint: Each code can be used once. Keep them somewhere safe.

errors.invalid: Please check the details you entered.
errors.email_taken: An account with this email already exists.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a minute.
errors.magic_failed: Could not send the link. Please try again.
errors.invalid_token: The link is invalid or has expired.

favorites.title: Favorite products
favorites.empty: You have no favorite products yet.

privacy.exportHint: Download a copy of your data in JSON format.
privacy.deleteHint: Your account is deleted and your data anonymized after 30 days. Orders are kept in anonymized form.

profile.title: Profile
profile.languageHint: Choose the default language for your account.

addresses.title: Addresses
addresses.empty: You have no saved addresses yet.
